holdings.infoBox: PSCI is an equity ETF with a total of 91 individual holdings. The top holdings are Argan stock at 2.97%, Powell Industries at 2.80%, ESCO Technologies at 2.71%, Everus Construction Group at 2.53%, and Zurn Elkay Water Solutions at 2.40%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Industrials ETF (PSCI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 / Industrials index. The fund tracks a cap-weighted index of industrial stocks selected from the S&P SmallCap 600. PSCI was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
